pageContext.name: Hellboy II: The Golden Army (Hot Foil Title)
pageContext.description: 'Let this remind you why you once feared the dark...'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the unframed Hellboy II: The Golden Army (Hot Foil Title) by Drew Struzan!  This 24 x 36' fine art lithograph print is hand-numbered with a gold hot foil title and printed on 300gsm archival paper.  A must-have for fans of Hellboy!
